# Known Malicious SHA256 Hashes

#   - One SHA256 hash per line (64 hex characters)
#   - Lines starting with # are comments
#   - All hashes are normalized to lowercase during loading

# HOW TO POPULATE:
#   - Download hash lists from threat intel feeds:
#     * MalwareBazaar: https://bazaar.abuse.ch/export/
#     * Abuse.ch URLhaus: https://urlhaus.abuse.ch/
#     * AlienVault OTX: https://otx.alienvault.com/
#     * VirusTotal Livehunt
#   - Add hashes from incident response findings
#   - Add hashes from your organization's threat intel
#
# NOTE: Keep this list focused and current. Remove old entries
#       that are no longer relevant to reduce scan time.
